name: adjust_quality
description: Control the compression quality and file size of the output image. Use automatic quality optimization to let imgix analyze the image content and choose the best quality-to-size ratio.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Quality level from 0 (lowest) to 100 (highest). Defaults to 75.

parameters.name: auto
parameters.description: Automatic optimizations. Use 'compress' for auto quality, 'format' for auto format, or 'compress,format' for both.

parameters.name: ch
parameters.description: Client hints: Width, DPR, Save-Data. Enables responsive serving.

parameters.name: fm
parameters.description: Output format for compression. Different formats have different quality profiles.

body.note: Returns the quality-optimized image. With auto=compress, imgix analyzes the image to pick an optimal quality level. Combined with auto=format, the best format is also selected.
